channel.description: Latest marine jobs for Oil And Gas
channel.title: Maritime Union - Job for Mariners

item.description:
Location:
Description:

Build a Career, Not Just a Contract

Deleum Group is a leading Malaysian oil & gas services company with decades of experience supporting major energy projects across Southeast Asia and beyond. We do not just hire manpower — we invest in people who want to grow with us long-term.

Why Deleum?

  • Direct career path — we promote from within, not outsource your future

  • International project exposure — work on platforms, rigs, and offshore installations across Asia-Pacific

  • Full GWO & OPITO training support — we certify you, not bill you

  • Competitive offshore packages — rotation schedules, accommodation, and transport covered

  • HSE-first culture — safety is not a poster on the wall, it is how we operate every day

Our Culture — Work Hard, Live Right

We are not a faceless contractor. Deleum runs an in-house Sports & Recreation club with regular events and team activities. We believe a healthy crew is a safe crew — work-life balance is policy, not a promise. Our people work as a family, not as replaceable units.

Who We Need:

  • Offshore technicians & mechanics

  • Rigging & lifting specialists

  • Scaffolding supervisors & inspectors

  • Coating & surface treatment experts

  • HSE officers & advisors

  • QA/QC inspectors (welding, coating, structural)

  • Marine crew & logistics coordinators

  • Instrumentation & electrical technicians

  • Rope access technicians (IRATA certified)

  • Project engineers & site supervisors

What You Bring:

  • Relevant offshore certifications (BOSIET, GWO, IRATA, CSWIP, NACE, etc.)

  • Experience on oil & gas platforms, FPSOs, rigs, or marine construction projects

  • Commitment to HSE standards — zero compromise

  • Willingness to learn and lead — we train leaders, not followers

Deleum Shared Values:

  • Service Quality — deliver once, deliver right

  • HSE Integrity — every person home safe, every rotation

  • Sustainability — long-term thinking in a short-term industry

Unsolicited applications welcome. If you are motivated, competent, and ready for accountability — we want to hear from you.

Full Crew Premium Advantage: Upgrade to Full Crew Premium to apply directly to Deleum HR with priority CV review. Premium members get first access to new offshore rotations before public posting.



Apply to this job
item.title: [Hot Job] Offshore Oil & Gas Personnel - (Malaysia & International Projects) at Deleum Group

item.description:
Location:
Description:

Ogenus Offshore is expanding and searching for an Electrical PIC to join a drillship. What we’re looking for:

  • Offshore experience
  • Project exposure (upgrades, commissioning, newbuilds)
  • Ability to work across teams (engineering, offshore, vendors)
  • Power generation and distribution (HV/LV)
  • Switchboards, UPS, emergency power
  • Control and automation systems
  • Plan and execute electrical maintenance and project activities


Apply to this job
item.title: [AI Job] Electrical PIC for Offshore Drillship – Immediate Start at Ogenus Offshore

item.description:
Location:
Description:

Position: Company Site Representative (CSR)

Project: ADNOC Charter

Location: UAE

Requirements:

  • Degree in Mechanical Engineering or equivalent.
  • 15 years experience in the Oil and Gas industry and construction projects including 10 years exposure to installation of jackets, decks, bridges, subsea cables, pipelines, hook-up.
  • Familiarity with international safety codes such as SOLAS / MODU etc. and knowledge of Adnoc HSE Standards.
  • Knowledge of offshore construction practices, marine/safety regulations, QA/QC, welding and coating.
  • Experience with work permits, compliance with safety regulations, safety meetings, toolbox.

Terms:

  • Salary: Negotiable
  • Contract: 3 Years
  • Joining: ASAP


Apply to this job
item.title: [AI Job] Company Site Representative (CSR) for ADNOC Charter Project at Maritime Universal

item.description:
Location:
Description:

Position: JUIMS Inspector

Project: ADNOC Charter

Location: UAE

Requirements:

  • Can review C/E from the SPJUB in the UAE who wants to try ashore work
  • OR strong previous experience as a JUIMS inspector
  • Marine Inspector to Conduct offshore rig, vessel & HSE inspections for Supply Vessels, AHTS, DP vessels, Jack-Up Barges & Rigs
  • Verification of compliance with offshore marine & HSE standards
  • Witness & conduct Pre-charter / DP trials, vessel audits & inspections
  • Carry out OVID inspections for offshore oil & gas vessels
  • Strong hands-on experience in offshore marine logistics, drilling support & rig / barge operations
  • 10+ years marine & offshore experience (Deep-sea tankers, offshore vessels, DSVs, Jack-Ups, Rigs)
  • Reporting, communication & stakeholder coordination skills in English

Terms:

  • Salary: Negotiable
  • Contract: 3 Years
  • Joining: ASAP


Apply to this job
item.title: [AI Job] JUIMS Inspector for Offshore Oil & Gas Vessels at Maritime Universal

item.description:
Location:
Description:

Crane Technician to join a DP3 Pipelay vessel in Spain on the 21st of April for 1 week.

You must have:

  • Passport
  • BOSIET or FOET (OPITO)
  • Oil & Gas UK Medical (OGUK)
  • CA-EBS Initial Deployment Training


Apply to this job
item.title: [AI Job] Crane Technician Needed for DP3 Pipelay Vessel – BOSIET Certification Required at WRS - Worldwide Recruitment Solutions

item.description:
Location:
Description:

WRS – Worldwide Recruitment Solutions are looking for an HSE Officer to join an offshore project in Qatar by mid-April 2026 for a 2-month duration.

Requirements:

  • 5 years of experience as an HSE Officer working offshore.
  • BOSIET/FOET certification.
  • OGUK Medical certification.
  • NEBOSH IGC certification.


Apply to this job
item.title: [AI Job] HSE Officer for Offshore Project – Qatar at WRS - Worldwide Recruitment Solutions

item.description:
Location:
Description:

We are looking for an HSE Lead to be based in Saudi Arabia. Duration: Permanent/direct hire to client. Requirement: Proficient in both English and Arabic, strong Technology and AI expertise.

If interested and qualified, please send your updated CV (no additional documents).



Apply to this job
item.title: [AI Job] HSE Project Lead with AI Expertise – Oilfield Services at Kuiper Group Singapore

item.description:
Location:
Description:

We are looking for a Safety Officer with 24 months of experience on Offshore vessels, Barges, or Rigs operations. The position is for a Self-Propelled Jack-Up Barge located in Saudi Arabia (ARAMCO). Traveling is scheduled for 31/03/2026.



Apply to this job
item.title: [AI Job] Safety Officer for Offshore Self-Propelled Jack-Up Barge – STCW Required at Ryan Ship Management Pvt Ltd

item.description:
Location:
Description:

Candidate Preference & Eligibility:

  • Candidates with previous ADNOC and/or ARAMCO approvals will be preferred due to urgency.
  • Candidates must not hold a valid UAE Employment Visa or Saudi Arabia Iqama at the time of application.
  • Candidates with prior ADNOC/ARAMCO approvals in the rank of Master (for Port Captain) or Chief Engineer (for Port Engineer) will be considered, provided they have a minimum of 48 months of rank experience and meet the client’s criteria.

If interested and available, please send your CV to…



Apply to this job
item.title: [AI Job] ADNOC/ARAMCO Approved Port Captain and Port Engineer Positions – Urgent Hiring at Aavishka Shipping Pvt Ltd

item.description:
Location:
Description:

Location: UAE

Permanent contract

Requirements: 24 months experience in similar type of vessel with 1000 DP hours with unlimited CoC.

If you meet the criteria and are interested in joining, please connect with us through the V Career page.



Apply to this job
item.title: [AI Job] Chief Engineer with DP Experience for Offshore Fleet at Brothers Shipping
